items.title: The Coming Deflationary Boom
items.description: We go over Elon Musk's deflationary boom prediction, its market impact, and discover capital allocation strategies to prepare. Read the full analysis here.

items.title: National Advertising Division Will Refer Rascals to the Federal Trade Commission for Failure to Comply with Compliance Inquiry Recommendation
items.description: Following a compliance review stemming from a prior decision (Case #7376) and concerns submitted by The Procter & Gamble Company (P&G), BBB National Programs’ National Advertising Division will refer Rascals International Limited to the Federal Trade Commission (FTC) for failure to comply with the National Advertising Division’s (NAD) recommendation in the underlying case.New York, NY, Dec. 01, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Following a compliance review stemming from a prior decision (Case #7376) and

items.title: The Unexpected Company That Actually Owns Jaguar Land Rover
items.description: Jaguar Land Rover has been building luxury British cars for a long time. Since, 2008, it has been owned by a company in another country that may surprise you.

items.title: The State Street Consumer Staples ETF Offers Sharper Focus and Lower Costs Than The iShares US Consumer Staples ETF
items.author: Will Healy
items.description: The article compares two consumer staples ETFs (XLP and IYK), highlighting differences in expense ratios, sector focus, and performance. XLP offers lower costs and a more concentrated consumer defensive approach, while IYK provides broader sector exposure.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Top holding in XLP, indicating strong market positioning in consumer staples sector
Top holding in XLP, representing strong retail presence in consumer staples ETF
Key holding in both XLP and IYK, suggesting stability in consumer staples sector
